No conformance term found in the text: 3.3.4). Le message est transmis avec un entête de type "EDXL-DE" (cf Enveloppe EDXL-DE) où distribution.kind est valorisé à Error, encapsulant le contenu du message json qui respecte le modèle suivant (cf. spécifications du Hub Santé

The packageId hl7.fhir.fr.core points to the canonical https://hl7.fr/ig/fhir/core/ImplementationGuide/hl7.fhir.fr.core which is inconsistent with the stated canonical of http://fhir.org/packages/hl7.fhir.fr.core/ImplementationGuide/hl7.fhir.fr.core

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '5.3.0', found versions: 1.0.1 (from hl7.fhir.fr.core#1.1.0), 4.0.1 (from hl7.fhir.r4.core#4.0.1), 5.3.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.3.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order' to 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order|5.3.0'

Wrong Display Name 'Créneau accessible par les professionnels de santé' for https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R314-TypeCreneau/FHIR/TRE-R314-TypeCreneau#PRO. Valid display is 'Créneau accessible par l'ensemble des professionnels de santé' (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

Wrong Display Name 'Créneau accessible par les CPTS' for https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R314-TypeCreneau/FHIR/TRE-R314-TypeCreneau#CPTS. Valid display is 'Créneau accessible par les communautés professionnelles territoriales de santé' (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

Wrong Display Name 'Créneau avec prise de RDV possible' for http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0276#ROUTINE. Valid display is 'Routine appointment - default if not valued' (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

Wrong Display Name 'Créneau sans prise de RDV possible à domicile' for http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0276#WALKIN. Valid display is 'A previously unscheduled walk-in visit' (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code
